speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Your morning routine
questions: What time do you wake up?
What do you do after you wake up?
Do you eat breakfast at home?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I wake up at six o'clock. I brush my teeth, then I take a shower and get dressed. Yes, I eat breakfast at home every day.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Housework
questions: Who does the housework in your family?
speaking.sampleAnswer: My mother cleans the house and cooks. I clean my own room every weekend. I cook about twice a week.
